strategy: Team fight. Bring a Fire hitter — she takes +30% from Fire and resists everything else (75% Ice, 63% Storm, 45% to the rest).
Supports stack blades on the hitter and Feints on the boss. She cannot be stunned, and her random Chain Lightning interrupts land whenever they like — keep the team topped up.

Let her forced-cast cycle play out. Each cycle she forces a random wizard to cast a minor effect: a 15% Elemental Weakness, a tiny Fire bomb DoT, a small HoT, or a 15% Spirit Blade. None of these matter much on their own.

Two rounds after the forced cast she clears those effects and deals 10% of max health per effect cleared. Spend or remove the forced effects before that round (use the blade, cleanse the weakness) to shrink the punish.
If minions are present, remember they copy every buff she casts — blades, traps, auras, even a Stormblade global. Clear them early or the enemy side snowballs together.
Build to one big Fire AoE and end it. Do not trade chip damage into 20,220 health and 45%+ resist.
cheatNotes: Whenever she buffs herself, any minions with her immediately copy the same kind of buff. Her setup rounds buff the whole enemy side, not just her.
The minions' copy when she casts a Global: Stormblade.
The minions' copy when she casts an Aura: Magnify, Sleet Storm, or Empowerment.
The minions' copy when she casts a Trap: Ice Trap or Storm Trap.
The minions' copy when she casts a Blade: Balanceblade, Iceblade (+45%), or Stormblade.
At random she interrupts with Chain Lightning. You cannot prevent it — keep health high enough to absorb a surprise Storm hit.
The forced-cast cycle starts on round 1 and loops for the whole fight.
She takes over a random wizard's turn and makes them cast one of four minor spells. You do not choose the target or the spell.
One forced option: a 15% Elemental Weakness. Weak on its own, but it counts as a hanging effect for her punish two rounds later.
One forced option: a triple bomb DoT dealing only 50 Fire after 5 rounds. The damage is trivial — the punish counting is what matters.
One forced option: a small HoT healing 50 over 5 rounds. Harmless, but it still counts toward the punish.
One forced option: a 15% Spirit Blade. Use it on your next attack if you can — a spent blade cannot be cleared for punish damage.
Two rounds after the forced cast she clears all remaining forced effects and deals 10% of your max health per effect cleared. Spend or remove the forced effects early to blunt this hit.
